hook.question: What if your reasoning style could become a reusable, remixable artifact?

trackIntro.title: How This Deck Flows
trackIntro.subtitle: Three pillars guide this overview: what Thinkprint captures, how the pipeline works, and where it connects with JDVP.

extraction.title: Logic Extraction
extraction.description: Capture reasoning structure from conversations — not memory, but how you think.

calibration.title: Calibration & Freeze
calibration.description: Refine thresholds, resolve contradictions, and freeze versioned snapshots.

connection.title: JDVP Synergy
connection.description: Connect Thinkprint modes with JDVP telemetry for measurable experimentation.

trackIntro.conclusion: Thinkprint turns reasoning into a playable, versionable artifact — not a fixed label, but an evolving mode.

point5.title: JDVP Synergy
point5.subtitle: How Thinkprint connects with the protocol

point1.title: What Thinkprint Is
point1.subtitle: Thinkprint captures how you reason — not what you remember.

toy.title: Logic-Structure Extractor
toy.description: A playful tool for building Thinkprint modes from your reasoning patterns.

reflection.title: Self-Reflection Playground
reflection.description: Not a memory-reconstruction product — a space to explore how you think.

declaration.title: Editable Reasoning Profile
declaration.description: Thinkprint mode = editable reasoning profile, not fixed personality labeling.

point2.title: What Thinkprint Is Not
point2.subtitle: Clearing up what Thinkprint deliberately avoids.

profiling.title: Not Commercial Profiling
profiling.description: No behavioral targeting or data monetization — purely self-directed exploration.

psychology.title: Not Memory Replication
psychology.description: Captures reasoning structure, not memories or lived experiences.

alignment.title: Not AI Alignment Control
alignment.description: A personal reasoning tool, not a system for controlling AI behavior.

cloning.title: Not Human Duplication
cloning.description: Extracts logic patterns — doesn't attempt to clone or replicate a person.

point3.title: Playground Pipeline
point3.subtitle: Four lightweight steps from conversation to remixable Thinkprint artifacts.

extract.title: Extract
extract.description: Conversation-based extraction. Draft your reasoning structure from dialogue signals.

calibrate.title: Calibrate
calibrate.description: Quick calibration prompts refine thresholds, preferences, and decision style.

deepen.title: Deepen
deepen.description: Interactive deepening on contradictions, delegation boundaries, and reasoning tradeoffs.

freeze.title: Freeze
freeze.description: Freeze a versioned snapshot you can reuse, compare, fork, and evolve.

point4.title: Output Artifacts
point4.subtitle: Each Thinkprint version produces three practical, remix-friendly artifacts.

declaration.title: thinkprint.md
declaration.description: Reasoning principles, delegation policy, risk boundaries, and update triggers.

prompt.title: agent_system_prompt.txt
prompt.description: Executable reasoning policy for agents. Fast to test and iterate.

metadata.title: metadata.json
metadata.description: Versioning, extraction method, confidence scores, and optional JDVP links.

point5.title: JDVP + Thinkprint Synergy
point5.subtitle: JDVP tracks where judgment moves. Thinkprint captures your logic structure. Together, they make experimentation measurable.

jdvp.title: JDVP Measures Shifts
jdvp.description: The protocol tracks judgment delegation across human-AI interactions in real time.

thinkprint.title: Thinkprint Models Patterns
thinkprint.description: Captures your reasoning structure as a reusable, versionable artifact.

future.title: Future Integration
future.description: JDVP telemetry feeds into Thinkprint drift tracking — reasoning evolution becomes measurable.

summary.title: Build Your Thinking Mode

point1.label: What It Is:
point1.text: A playful logic-structure extractor that turns reasoning into remixable modes.

point2.label: How It Works:
point2.text: Extract → Calibrate → Deepen → Freeze — four steps to a versioned Thinkprint.

point3.label: Why It Matters:
point3.text: Connected with JDVP, reasoning becomes a measurable, evolving infrastructure.

summary.tagline: Thinkprint: Extract your logic, remix your mode, evolve your reasoning.
